# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo BUILDING', description: 'Command for building application')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: 'echo TESTING', description: 'Command for testing application')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo DEPLOYING', description: 'Command for deploying application')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
            }
        }
    }
}
